arts.ttl: Billy Gilmour 'to be benched' for Napoli's key clash with Roma as Antonio Conte left fizzing by team leak
arts.sum: The Scot has impressed in recent weeks but will reportedly have to make do with a place on the bench against Roma

arts.ttl: Roma Set to Take on Napoli Without Talismanic Forward
arts.sum: New Roma manager Claudio Ranieri addressed the media in the build-up to his side's mouth-watering Serie A trip to Napoli. One of the major talking points during the press conference was Paulo Dybala's lack of match fitness. The post Roma Set to Take on Napoli Without Talismanic Forward appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Juventus Eye Zirkzee as Napoli and Atalanta Compete for Raspadori
Scotland sensation Doak was already terrorising English Championship defenders before he put Gvardiol and Zalewski to the sword
arts.sum: If you thought Josko Gvardiol and Nicola Zalewski had a hard time against Ben Doak during Scotland's victories over Croatia and Poland, then spare a thought for those who went before.
